synopsis:
"The End of History" is a canon short story which is included in Star Wars Insider 154. It is written by Alexander Freed and is illustrated by Chris Scalf.
When Miru Nadrinakar, a member of the Corellian Resistance, crashes on a Geonosian colony world, Antron Bach, an antique dealer in-hiding, must decide whether to help her escape the Galactic Empire or to protect the Jedi artifacts he has kept safe since the Jedi Order's destruction.
title: The End Of History
